jobs.prompt: Assess whether this v1 proposal is complete enough to begin implementation. Return concise Korean with sections: 판정 (COMPLETE 또는 NOT_READY) / 남은 blocker / 바로 고칠 문서 / 좋은 점. Only say COMPLETE if there are no high-severity blockers.

Review combat, boss readability, HUD, camera, and feedback timing. Return concise Korean with sections: 판정 (COMPLETE 또는 NOT_READY) / 남은 blocker / 바로 고칠 문서 / 좋은 점. Only say COMPLETE if combat-facing docs are ready for implementation discussion.

Review table coverage, item/economy clarity, and data authoring readiness. Return concise Korean with sections: 판정 (COMPLETE 또는 NOT_READY) / 남은 blocker / 바로 고칠 문서 / 좋은 점. Only say COMPLETE if the remaining missing tables are non-blocking.

Review party flow, entry, reconnect, revive, wipe recovery, and quick communication. Return concise Korean with sections: 판정 (COMPLETE 또는 NOT_READY) / 남은 blocker / 바로 고칠 문서 / 좋은 점. Only say COMPLETE if co-op flow docs are ready for implementation discussion.
